hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; in=$(cat); c=$(printf '%s' "$in" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [ -n "$c" ] || exit 0; printf '%s' "$c" | grep -Eq '(^|[[:space:];&|(])git[[:space:]]+([^;&|]*[[:space:]])?push([[:space:]]|$)' || exit 0; printf '%s' "$c" | grep -Eq '(^|[[:space:]])(--force[^[:space:]]*|--delete|--mirror|--prune|-f|-d)([[:space:]]|$)|[[:space:]]\+[^[:space:]]+' || exit 0; printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"git push with a force/destructive flag (--force*/-f/--delete/-d/--mirror/--prune/+refspec) detected anywhere in the command - Fast-path exception, needs explicit user confirmation"}}'
